key_insights.insight: Our bodies naturally form microscopic cancers daily, but our health defense systems usually eliminate them.
key_insights.quote: Every 24 hours, there are 10,000 mistakes that are made in your body. Each of those is a microscopic cancer. But the reason that we don't become more sick from all kinds of diseases, including cancer, is because our body is hardwired with its own health defense systems.

key_insights.insight: The body possesses five key health defenses: blood vessels (angiogenesis), immunity, and three others, all crucial for longevity.
key_insights.quote: Besides the foods you eat, other things that can compromise your health defenses, and by the way, there are five health defenses...You want to, if you want longevity, you need all five of your health defenses and more to be working in your favor.

key_insights.insight: Foods have the power to either boost or diminish our body's natural health defenses, influencing disease risk.
key_insights.quote: We also know that you can eat foods that support, prompt up, fortify your body's natural ability to control blood vessels... I could eat foods, I can drink things that cause my body to malfunction.

key_insights.insight: Consuming excessive amounts of sodium, added sugar, and alcohol can significantly weaken the body's natural defenses.
key_insights.quote: Excess sodium, too much salt... High blood sugar can also do the same thing...Alcohol is another one that actually can take down your health defenses over time.

key_insights.insight: The glymphatic system, a 'sewer system' in the brain, cleanses toxins during deep REM sleep; chronic stress and poor sleep impair this process.
key_insights.quote: Well, there's a sewer system in our brains that's called the glymphatic system...it drains those toxins out while you're sleeping, and only when you get good sleep. So when you're stressed and you're not getting good sleep, you start to accumulate these toxins.

key_insights.insight: Visceral fat, which is different from subcutaneous fat, is strongly associated with increased inflammation and higher risk of various cancers.
key_insights.quote: It turns out that excess visceral fat has been linked to 14 other cancers, increased risk of 14 other cancers. Everything from colon, ovarian, lung, breast, prostate.

key_insights.insight: The gut microbiome plays a vital role in the efficacy of immunotherapy treatments, specifically the presence of *Akkermansia muciniphila*.
key_insights.quote: The research that was presented showed that there was no differences between the groups of responders...except for one thing that one thing was one bacteria the responders had one bacteria called acromansiamucinophila.

key_insights.insight: Trending diets are short term solutions and it's healthier to find a sustainable way of eating that works for you personally, that you can maintain and that you're going to enjoy your life as well.
key_insights.quote: Trending diets are well intentioned. They often are designed to do one thing, but you can't keep it up. So it doesn't really at the end of the day contribute to the ultimate goal.

actionable_advice.advice: Replace plastic food containers, cups, plates, and silverware with ceramic or glass alternatives to reduce microplastic exposure.
actionable_advice.how_to: Discard all plastic cups, plates, and silverware, and switch to ceramic or glass for both food storage and consumption.

actionable_advice.advice: Be cautious of tea bags and flavored teas due to potential microplastic shedding and artificial ingredients.
actionable_advice.how_to: Opt for loose-leaf tea instead of tea bags, and carefully check the ingredient labels of flavored teas to ensure they contain real ingredients.

actionable_advice.advice: Grow your own *Akkermansia muciniphila* by consuming foods like pomegranate, cranberries, concord grapes, chili peppers, and Chinese black vinegar.
actionable_advice.how_to: Incorporate at least one of these foods into your diet daily, considering the use of pomegranate juice, dried cranberries, or Chinese black vinegar as condiments.

actionable_advice.advice: Optimize fasting by consistently getting eight hours of sleep and extending the non-eating window by avoiding late-night snacks and delaying breakfast for at least an hour.
actionable_advice.how_to: Aim to finish dinner by 8 pm, avoid eating anything before bed, and postpone breakfast until at least 8 am after waking up at 7 am.

actionable_advice.advice: Eat cooked tomatoes several times a week to reduce prostate cancer risk.
actionable_advice.how_to: Consume at least two to three servings (half a cup each) of cooked tomatoes per week, such as in pasta sauce or stews.

actionable_advice.advice: To activate brown fat, sleep in a cool room or take cold baths.
actionable_advice.how_to: lower room temperature and take cold baths frequently.

memorable_stories: Story of Dr. Lee's mother's stage four cancer reversal using immunotherapy and diet adjustments.
Story of Dr. Lee's great uncle attributing his longevity to drinking fresh green tea daily and social connection.
Description of the discovery of brown fat in hibernating animals.
contrarian_claims: Eating meat and processed foods occasionally is not harmful if health defenses are strong.
A little stress is good for you.
episode_title: The Diary Of A CEO with Steven Bartlett - The Chronic Disease Expert: We Can Now Reverse Stage 4 Cancer! This Common Food Is Feeding Your Cancer Cells!
